definition: TrueEcon+ = 100 x par economy / actual economy over the exact legal-ball phase mix bowled, priced by the league-season phase par (a death specialist is priced against death par). 100 = an average bowler of the same league / season / phase mix; above 100 = leaked fewer runs than era par. true_economy = par - actual (runs saved per over versus par). Economy = (batter runs + wides + no-balls) per 6 legal balls (byes and leg-byes are not charged). strike_rate = legal balls per bowler-credited wicket (null when the bowler-season took none). Qualifier: >= 90 legal balls in the (league, season). This is engine #1's par family, flipped from batting to bowling; the batting twin is engines/srplus.json.
